issues.description: Missing condition for cost requirement. Card text states 'You may place 3 cards from your trash at the bottom of your deck' as a prerequisite action before the K.O. effect can resolve. This should be a condition or separate action sequence, not just the K.O. alone.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is incomplete. Should include maxCost constraint in target definition. Current maxCost:2 is correct but needs proper targeting syntax.

Missing action for the cost payment condition: placing 3 cards from trash to bottom of deck. The card has a cost requirement ('You may place 3 cards from your trash...') that must be represented in the DSL before the K.O. can execute.
